TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: msegasut Á•≠ŚŹł phiyug sapah brah na ka msegasut Á•≠ŚŹłŤďčŚĪčŚČćÁöĄŤ≤¨šĽĽ phiyug sapah brah na o asi ka kmeaguh msegasut gmdara rudux smapuh, rsuhan na dara rudux kana ka qngqaya djiyun smmalu sapah, kika hana prajing smmalu sapah da. Murug gaya Truku sbiyaw ka smapuh rusan na dara rudux kana ka phyugan sapah, duri ni pgblaiq, skbiyax hiyi ni aji hyyuya kingal ruwan sapah. mnhdu smmalu ka msegasut Á•≠ŚŹłŤďčŚĪčŚģĆŚ∑•ÁöĄŤ≤¨šĽĽ Mnhdu smmalu do Kmeaguh duri msegasut murug gaya Truku gmdara kingal bubuy muda mqaras mgay smapuh, msegasut o daan na hmirit cicih kana keelgan hiyi babuy, lbuun na rnabaw tamul biqan na tnpusu sapah ni saan na gmqi uyung tqring dnamux, saw nii meysa utux rudan pqblaiq ni aji hyihuya kingal ruwan sapah. ida nkiya ni Truku sbiyaw šĽ•ŚČćŚ§™ť≠ĮťĖ£śóŹŤąáŤá™ÁĄ∂ Ita Truku sbiyaw o smparu bi kana hmut mneudus ida nkiya, qngqaya smluun sapah o asi angal qhuni lnglingay sapah, erut o qrul, miying keelgan qhuni ka ngalan dha knuruh gasil,gmbari, sbiyaw balay ka dnamux o kurut aji uri o tapaq btunux, qnabil o tntunun dha meiluq sida qhuni smmalu saw nii sapah o Truku mkBaraw, Truku mkSiyaw o djima ka ngalan dha dnamux ni qnabil aji uri o bhngil. Sapah saw nii ga meuxul misan ni mtleetu rbagan, gnutu dha qnabil meiluq rqling sida qhuni ga mdngu do hglqun dha mtahu, nasi wada meelih ka qhuni qnabil do malan dha meiluq qhuni paah baraw qnabil. Sapah Truku sbiyaw o kmari yaa bi smka tnxalan rbqan tuma dxgal, kiya ka saan mtaqi kingal ruwan sapah,pmkayan,ini salu daka ka Truku sbiyaw, kiya ka kiya ni smmalu rpun,biyi rudux ni biyi babuy uri,saw nii knkla dha smmalu sapah ka rudan ta Truku sbiyaw. Niqan kingal ka uyas smdamat alang nniqan "Ga gaing bi kska suyang ayug, kiya ka alang mu saw smdamat. Tglihug muda rnaaw ni ayug gaga, elug bilaq dgiyaq o ga mtqiri hiya uri. powda dowriq ka tama qmita alang saw smdamat, liwaq msa rdax rusuq dowriq o ga htnay ska dowriq na"
S.PHON: ms…ôgasut ** pńßijug sapańß b…ĺańß na ka ms…ôgasut ******** pńßijug sapańß b…ĺańß na o asi ka km…ôaguńß ms…ôgasut gmda…ĺa …ĺudux smapuńß, …ĺsuńßan na da…ĺa …ĺudux kana ka qŇčqaja d…üijun smmalu sapańß, kika ńßana p…ĺa…üiŇč smmalu sapańß da. mu…ĺug gaja t…ĺuku sbijaw ka smapuńß …ĺusan na da…ĺa …ĺudux kana ka pńßjugan sapańß, du…ĺi ni pgblaiq, skbijax ńßiji ni a…üi ńßjjuja kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß. mnńßdu smmalu ka ms…ôgasut ********* mnńßdu smmalu do km…ôaguńß du…ĺi ms…ôgasut mu…ĺug gaja t…ĺuku gmda…ĺa kiŇčal bubuj muda mqa…ĺas mgaj smapuńß, ms…ôgasut o daan na ńßmi…ĺit ¶i ¶ińß kana k…ô…ôlgan ńßiji babuj, lbuun na …ĺnabaw tamul biqan na tnpusu sapańß ni saan na gmqi ujuŇč tq…ĺiŇč dnamux, saw nii m…ôsa utux …ĺudan pqblaiq ni a…üi ńßjińßuja kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß. ida nkija ni t…ĺuku sbijaw ********* ita t…ĺuku sbijaw o smpa…ĺu bi kana ńßmut mn…ôudus ida nkija, qŇčqaja smluun sapańß o asi aŇčal qńßuni lŇčliŇčaj sapańß, …ô…ĺut o q…ĺul, mijiŇč k…ô…ôlgan qńßuni ka Ňčalan dńßa knu…ĺuńß gasil,gmba…ĺi, sbijaw balaj ka dnamux o ku…ĺut a…üi u…ĺi o tapaq btunux, qnabil o tntunun dńßa m…ôiluq sida qńßuni smmalu saw nii sapańß o t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw, t…ĺuku mksijaw o d…üima ka Ňčalan dńßa dnamux ni qnabil a…üi u…ĺi o bńßŇčil. sapańß saw nii ga m…ôuxul misan ni mtl…ô…ôtu …ĺbagan, gnutu dńßa qnabil m…ôiluq …ĺqliŇč sida qńßuni ga mdŇču do ńßglqun dńßa mtańßu, nasi wada m…ô…ôlińß ka qńßuni qnabil do malan dńßa m…ôiluq qńßuni paańß ba…ĺaw qnabil. sapańß t…ĺuku sbijaw o kma…ĺi jaa bi smka tnxalan …ĺbqan tuma dxgal, kija ka saan mtaqi kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß,pmkajan,ini salu daka ka t…ĺuku sbijaw, kija ka kija ni smmalu …ĺpun,biji …ĺudux ni biji babuj u…ĺi,saw nii knkla dńßa smmalu sapańß ka …ĺudan ta t…ĺuku sbijaw. niqan kiŇčal ka ujas smdamat alaŇč nniqan "ga gaiŇč bi kska sujaŇč ajug, kija ka alaŇč mu saw smdamat. tglińßug muda …ĺnaaw ni ajug gaga, …ôlug bilaq dgijaq o ga mtqi…ĺi ńßija u…ĺi. powda dow…ĺiq ka tama qmita alaŇč saw smdamat, liwaq msa …ĺdax …ĺusuq dow…ĺiq o ga ńßtnaj ska dow…ĺiq na"
S.FORM: msegasut Á•≠ŚŹł phiyug sapah brah na ka msegasut Á•≠ŚŹłŤďčŚĪčŚČćÁöĄŤ≤¨šĽĽ phiyug sapah brah na o asi ka kmeaguh msegasut gmdara rudux smapuh, rsuhan na dara rudux kana ka qngqaya djiyun smmalu sapah, kika hana prajing smmalu sapah da. Murug gaya Truku sbiyaw ka smapuh rusan na dara rudux kana ka phyugan sapah, duri ni pgblaiq, skbiyax hiyi ni aji hyyuya kingal ruwan sapah. mnhdu smmalu ka msegasut Á•≠ŚŹłŤďčŚĪčŚģĆŚ∑•ÁöĄŤ≤¨šĽĽ Mnhdu smmalu do Kmeaguh duri msegasut murug gaya Truku gmdara kingal bubuy muda mqaras mgay smapuh, msegasut o daan na hmirit cicih kana keelgan hiyi babuy, lbuun na rnabaw tamul biqan na tnpusu sapah ni saan na gmqi uyung tqring dnamux, saw nii meysa utux rudan pqblaiq ni aji hyihuya kingal ruwan sapah. ida nkiya ni Truku sbiyaw šĽ•ŚČćŚ§™ť≠ĮťĖ£śóŹŤąáŤá™ÁĄ∂ Ita Truku sbiyaw o smparu bi kana hmut mneudus ida nkiya, qngqaya smluun sapah o asi angal qhuni lnglingay sapah, erut o qrul, miying keelgan qhuni ka ngalan dha knuruh gasil,gmbari, sbiyaw balay ka dnamux o kurut aji uri o tapaq btunux, qnabil o tntunun dha meiluq sida qhuni smmalu saw nii sapah o Truku mkBaraw, Truku mkSiyaw o djima ka ngalan dha dnamux ni qnabil aji uri o bhngil. Sapah saw nii ga meuxul misan ni mtleetu rbagan, gnutu dha qnabil meiluq rqling sida qhuni ga mdngu do hglqun dha mtahu, nasi wada meelih ka qhuni qnabil do malan dha meiluq qhuni paah baraw qnabil. Sapah Truku sbiyaw o kmari yaa bi smka tnxalan rbqan tuma dxgal, kiya ka saan mtaqi kingal ruwan sapah,pmkayan,ini salu daka ka Truku sbiyaw, kiya ka kiya ni smmalu rpun,biyi rudux ni biyi babuy uri,saw nii knkla dha smmalu sapah ka rudan ta Truku sbiyaw. Niqan kingal ka uyas smdamat alang nniqan "Ga gaing bi kska suyang ayug, kiya ka alang mu saw smdamat. Tglihug muda rnaaw ni ayug gaga, elug bilaq dgiyaq o ga mtqiri hiya uri. powda dowriq ka tama qmita alang saw smdamat, liwaq msa rdax rusuq dowriq o ga htnay ska dowriq na"

smmalu sapańß, kika ńßana p…ĺa…üiŇč smmalu sapańß da. mu…ĺug gaja t…ĺuku sbijaw ka smapuńß …ĺusan na da…ĺa …ĺudux kana ka pńßjugan sapańß, du…ĺi ni pgblaiq, skbijax ńßiji ni a…üi ńßjjuja kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß. mnńßdu smmalu ka ms…ôgasut ********* mnńßdu smmalu do km…ôaguńß du…ĺi ms…ôgasut mu…ĺug gaja t…ĺuku gmda…ĺa kiŇčal bubuj muda mqa…ĺas mgaj smapuńß, ms…ôgasut o daan na ńßmi…ĺit ¶i ¶ińß kana k…ô…ôlgan ńßiji babuj, lbuun na …ĺnabaw tamul biqan na tnpusu sapańß ni saan na gmqi ujuŇč tq…ĺiŇč dnamux, saw nii m…ôsa utux …ĺudan pqblaiq ni a…üi ńßjińßuja kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß. ida nkija ni t…ĺuku sbijaw ********* ita t…ĺuku sbijaw o smpa…ĺu bi kana ńßmut mn…ôudus ida nkija, qŇčqaja smluun sapańß o asi aŇčal qńßuni lŇčliŇčaj sapańß, …ô…ĺut o q…ĺul, mijiŇč k…ô…ôlgan qńßuni ka Ňčalan dńßa knu…ĺuńß gasil,gmba…ĺi, sbijaw balaj ka dnamux o ku…ĺut a…üi u…ĺi o tapaq btunux, qnabil o tntunun dńßa m…ôiluq sida qńßuni smmalu saw nii sapańß o t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw, t…ĺuku mksijaw o d…üima ka Ňčalan dńßa dnamux ni qnabil a…üi u…ĺi o bńßŇčil. sapańß saw nii ga m…ôuxul misan ni mtl…ô…ôtu …ĺbagan, gnutu dńßa qnabil m…ôiluq …ĺqliŇč sida qńßuni ga mdŇču do ńßglqun dńßa mtańßu, nasi wada m…ô…ôlińß ka qńßuni qnabil do malan dńßa m…ôiluq qńßuni paańß ba…ĺaw qnabil. sapańß t…ĺuku sbijaw o kma…ĺi jaa bi smka tnxalan …ĺbqan tuma dxgal, kija ka saan mtaqi kiŇčal …ĺuwan sapańß,pmkajan,ini salu daka ka t…ĺuku sbijaw, kija ka kija ni smmalu …ĺpun,biji …ĺudux ni biji babuj u…ĺi,saw nii knkla dńßa smmalu sapańß ka …ĺudan ta t…ĺuku sbijaw. niqan kiŇčal ka ujas smdamat alaŇč nniqan "ga gaiŇč bi kska sujaŇč ajug, kija ka alaŇč mu saw smdamat. tglińßug muda …ĺnaaw ni ajug gaga, …ôlug bilaq dgijaq o ga mtqi…ĺi ńßija u…ĺi. powda dow…ĺiq ka tama qmita alaŇč saw smdamat, liwaq msa …ĺdax …ĺusuq dow…ĺiq o ga ńßtnaj ska dow…ĺiq na"
